code:
import io
import string

match io.read_line()
when Some(line)
  mut result = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      let nb = if (b >= 65 and b <= 90) or (b >= 97 and b <= 122)
        b + 32 - 2 * (b % 32) + 31
      else
        b
      end
      let toggled = if (b >= 65 and b <= 90) or (b >= 97 and b <= 122)
        if b >= 97
          b - 32
        else
          b + 32
        end
      else
        b
      end
      result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(toggled)}"
    when None
      i = i
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(result)
when None
  println("")
end
